special_mechanics.name: Ground/Air Level Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a robotic aircraft (FX-1) that can descend to ground level via secondary button. While on ground level, player is unaffected by airborne unit attacks but vulnerable to ground units. Ship automatically returns to air after certain time period.

special_mechanics.name: 8-way Movement
special_mechanics.description: 8-way joystick controls player ship movements in all directions with no documented speed constraints

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Ejection System
special_mechanics.description: Weapons (wings) can be ejected before equipping new ones. Damaged weapons auto-disintegrate and eject when hit by enemy attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Horizontal Infinite Wrapping
special_mechanics.description: Background image continues infinitely when player scrolls in horizontal directions

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical data. B-Wings is a scrolling shooter with no documented detailed movement physics values. Sources provide gameplay mechanics and weapon system information but no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, accelerations, gravity values). The focus is on weapon variety and level design rather than precise movement physics.
